verdict: Buy XEQT.TO at $44.56 CAD. Core is 10.5% vs 40% target — $1,873 to go. Fund first, every deposit.
Cap breaches: CEG, OSS. Do not add — shrink by dilution.
Theme concentration at 89.4%. Building XEQT core is the fix.
Skip: MSFT above no-chase; PLTR above no-chase.

warnings: UNDER-DIVERSIFIED: XEQT core is 10.5% vs 40% target (29.5pp below). Prioritize funding core.
